description: Externalize 14 knowledge-wrapper skills into per-repo skill-* GitHub repos under carbonscott/, leaving deploy-opencode with only skills.manifest.json + deploy.sh. cuda-docs (15th wrapper) is the reference skill — extracted manually in Phase 3 outside this loop. Each story extracts one skill: stages its claude/+opencode/+optional-tools/ layout, populates from the deployed copy at /sdf/group/lcls/ds/dm/apps/dev/opencode/skills/<name>/, pushes to its skill-<name> remote, and verifies deploy.sh dry-runs cleanly. Cron-bearing skills also install a crontab entry on sdfcron001. Read handoff/skill-externalize-guide.md and handoff/skill-audit-2026-05-13.md first — they are the canonical layout and source-of-truth reference for this work.

stories.title: Extract ask-ami into skill-ask-ami
acceptanceCriteria: Read handoff/skill-externalize-guide.md (layout + conventions) and handoff/skill-audit-2026-05-13.md (per-skill row for ask-ami)
Verify carbonscott/skill-ask-ami exists on GitHub via `gh repo view carbonscott/skill-ask-ami --json name` — if not, log a blocker and stop (user creates repos manually)

Stage content at /tmp/skill-ask-ami-stage on the bridge worktree host: copy /sdf/group/lcls/ds/dm/apps/dev/opencode/skills/ask-ami/SKILL.md to both claude/skills/ask-ami/SKILL.md and opencode/skills/ask-ami/SKILL.md (identical content, duplicated — no shared/ dir)
Write README.md at repo root (one paragraph: what the skill does, link back to deploy-opencode meta-deploy)
git init -b main, configure user.name/email, commit with subject 'Initial: ask-ami knowledge wrapper'
git remote add origin git@github.com:carbonscott/skill-ask-ami.git && git push -u origin main
Verify manifest entry already present: jq '.skills[] | select(.name=="ask-ami")' skills.manifest.json (no edit needed, already added in Phase 2)
Run DRY_RUN=1 ./deploy.sh ask-ami and confirm it clones the new repo and would rsync opencode/skills/ask-ami/ correctly
Commit any progress to externalize-knowledge-wrappers branch only if the worktree itself changed (it should not — staging is in /tmp)
Log a `pattern` notebook entry capturing anything reusable for the next no-cron skill (especially the no-existing-remote case)

stories.title: Extract ask-lcls2 into skill-ask-lcls2
acceptanceCriteria: Same pattern as WRAP-01 (read the guide + audit row first)
Verify carbonscott/skill-ask-lcls2 exists on GitHub; blocker if not
Stage at /tmp/skill-ask-lcls2-stage with claude/skills/ask-lcls2/SKILL.md + opencode/skills/ask-lcls2/SKILL.md + README.md (source: /sdf/group/lcls/ds/dm/apps/dev/opencode/skills/ask-lcls2/SKILL.md)
README must note the central_data dependency: /sdf/group/lcls/ds/dm/apps/dev/software/lcls2 (with its .agent_docs/ + .code-index.db, maintained out-of-band by deploy-opencode's update-index.sh)
git init/commit/push to git@github.com:carbonscott/skill-ask-lcls2.git
DRY_RUN=1 ./deploy.sh ask-lcls2 succeeds
Log impl + pattern entries

stories.title: Extract ask-smalldata into skill-ask-smalldata
acceptanceCriteria: Same pattern as WRAP-02 (no-cron, central_data points to a software repo)
Verify carbonscott/skill-ask-smalldata exists; blocker if not
Stage at /tmp/skill-ask-smalldata-stage; source SKILL.md from /sdf/group/lcls/ds/dm/apps/dev/opencode/skills/ask-smalldata/
README notes the central_data: /sdf/group/lcls/ds/dm/apps/dev/software/smalldata_tools (with .agent_docs/ + .code-index.db, manually maintained)
git init/commit/push to skill-ask-smalldata
DRY_RUN=1 ./deploy.sh ask-smalldata succeeds

stories.title: Reshape skill-ask-slurm-s3df from flat to claude/+opencode/ layout
acceptanceCriteria: Read the audit row: existing flat-layout remote carbonscott/skill-ask-slurm-s3df contains SKILL.md + README.md
Clone the existing repo to /tmp/skill-ask-slurm-s3df-stage (preserve git history — do NOT init fresh)
Move (git mv) SKILL.md → claude/skills/ask-slurm-s3df/SKILL.md, then duplicate to opencode/skills/ask-slurm-s3df/SKILL.md. Keep README.md at root
Update README.md to reflect the new layout (claude/+opencode/) and remove any stale instructions

If the SKILL.md content differs from /sdf/group/lcls/ds/dm/apps/dev/opencode/skills/ask-slurm-s3df/SKILL.md, prefer the deployed copy as source of truth (per audit) — diff them first; if different, replace and note in commit message
git commit -m 'Reshape into claude/+opencode/ layout' && git push origin main
DRY_RUN=1 ./deploy.sh ask-slurm-s3df succeeds
Log a `pattern` entry on the reshape sequence — future flat-to-claude+opencode stories should reference this

stories.title: Reshape skill-askcode from flat to claude/+opencode/ layout
acceptanceCriteria: Audit row: existing carbonscott/skill-askcode is flat (SKILL.md, README.md, env.sh)
Clone to /tmp/skill-askcode-stage
Move SKILL.md and env.sh into claude/skills/askcode/ and duplicate to opencode/skills/askcode/. Keep README.md at root
Diff against /sdf/group/lcls/ds/dm/apps/dev/opencode/skills/askcode/ — sync any drift toward the deployed copy
Commit + push
DRY_RUN=1 ./deploy.sh askcode succeeds (verify env.sh ends up rsynced into the deployed skills/askcode/)

stories.title: Reshape skill-docs-search from flat to claude/+opencode/ layout
acceptanceCriteria: Audit row: existing carbonscott/skill-docs-search is flat (SKILL.md, README.md, bin/, env.sh)

Audit override: docs-search worktree has scripts/ + facility-env.sh + SKILL.md that the deployed copy is missing. Include scripts/ in the new repo (this is the one approved exception to 'deployed is source of truth')
Clone existing remote to /tmp/skill-docs-search-stage
Layout: README.md (root), claude/skills/docs-search/{SKILL.md, env.sh, facility-env.sh, scripts/, bin/}, opencode/skills/docs-search/{same files, identical}
Source SKILL.md from /sdf/group/lcls/ds/dm/apps/dev/opencode/skills/docs-search/SKILL.md; source scripts/ from the worktree's claude/skills/docs-search/scripts/ (per the audit exception)
Commit + push
DRY_RUN=1 ./deploy.sh docs-search succeeds
Log a `pattern` entry on the scripts/+bin/+env.sh+facility-env.sh combo

stories.title: Extract experimental-hutch-python into skill-experimental-hutch-python
acceptanceCriteria: Audit row: no existing remote; deployed copy has SKILL.md + scripts/ + references/
Verify carbonscott/skill-experimental-hutch-python exists; blocker if not

Stage at /tmp/skill-experimental-hutch-python-stage; copy SKILL.md + scripts/ + references/ from /sdf/group/lcls/ds/dm/apps/dev/opencode/skills/experimental-hutch-python/ into BOTH claude/skills/experimental-hutch-python/ and opencode/skills/experimental-hutch-python/
README.md notes this is experimental (per its name and deploy-opencode CLAUDE.md marker)
git init/commit/push to skill-experimental-hutch-python
DRY_RUN=1 ./deploy.sh experimental-hutch-python succeeds

stories.title: Extract ask-epics into skill-ask-epics (FIRST cron-bearing — becomes the cron reference)
acceptanceCriteria: This story establishes the cron-bearing skill pattern. After this story passes, the next ralph subagent MUST read this repo as the cron-bearing reference (in addition to cuda-docs as the no-cron reference)
Audit row: existing remote carbonscott/skill-ask-epics has flat layout + tools/. Cron: weekly Sun 3am
Clone existing remote to /tmp/skill-ask-epics-stage
Restructure: claude/skills/ask-epics/{SKILL.md, bin/, env.local, env.sh, setup.sh} + opencode/skills/ask-epics/{identical} + tools/epics-docs/{scripts/epics-docs-cron.sh, ...rest of existing tools/}

Source skill content from /sdf/group/lcls/ds/dm/apps/dev/opencode/skills/ask-epics/; source tools/ from the existing remote OR /sdf/group/lcls/ds/dm/apps/dev/tools/epics-docs/ — diff first and use whichever is newer/more complete
Verify env.sh / setup.sh paths still point at /sdf/group/lcls/ds/dm/apps/dev/... after rsync (they should — they're sourced from deployed location post-deploy)
Update README.md at root: explain the cron tooling and that tools/epics-docs/ gets rsynced to /sdf/group/lcls/ds/dm/apps/dev/tools/epics-docs/
Commit + push
DRY_RUN=1 ./deploy.sh ask-epics succeeds AND shows it would rsync tools/epics-docs/ to /sdf/group/lcls/ds/dm/apps/dev/tools/epics-docs/

After dry-run looks correct, do NOT run real deploy from this story (operator will run it after reviewing). Stop and ask user to approve crontab install for: 0 3 * * 0 /sdf/group/lcls/ds/dm/apps/dev/tools/epics-docs/scripts/epics-docs-cron.sh on sdfcron001
Log a `pattern` entry titled 'cron-bearing skill extraction reference' covering: tools/ rsync behaviour, env.sh path stability, crontab schedule format

Request crontab install for: 0 3 * * 0 /sdf/group/lcls/ds/dm/apps/dev/tools/nersc-docs/scripts/nersc-docs-cron.sh on sdfcron001

Follow WRAP-08 pattern

Commit + push
